value.found_quote: The setup flow enables remote access for that host, then shows a QR code you can scan from your phone. ... Use your phone to scan the QR code shown by Codex. The code opens ChatGPT so you can finish connecting the mobile app to the host.
value.rationale: The page describes setting up mobile access by scanning a QR code that opens ChatGPT to connect the Codex mobile app to a host, matching the claim. Presented as a current feature.
